title: Cobblemon Poké ball Swap
description: This mod adds a command anyone can use that allows you to swap a pokémon's pokémon
body:
This mod adds a command that allows you to change a Pokemon's Poké ball to the pokeball you're holding so you can change it for cosmetic purposes
 
the command is /pokeballswap and the slot number of the Pokémon who's Poké ball you wanna change
